title: Project Kubric bugs?
body:
Went to use the Project Kubric builds, found two issues:

* The docker manpages are being shipped in the `podman` binary package
* There is a typo'd directory `/usr/share/bash-completion/comletions/`

What's the best place to file these bugs?

comments.body: Thanks for reaching out! This seems related to the opensuse packages, so I suggest to file them at https://bugzilla.opensuse.org.
So openSuse says the Deb artifacts of project kubic are managed by upstream.
